info.name: E-Commerce Lab API
info.description: Full API test collection for e-commerce-lab.onrender.com — covers Auth, Products, Cart, Orders, Wishlist, Reviews, Coupons, Gift Cards, 2FA, and Admin endpoints.

item.name: TC-010 | Get Products with Custom Filters

exec: pm.test('Category has id and name', () => { if(json.length > 0) { pm.expect(json[0].id).to.exist; pm.expect(json[0].name).to.be.a('string'); }});

item.name: TC-030 | Add Gift Card to Cart

body.raw:
{
  "code": "GIFT-TEST-001",
  "name": "Test Gift Card",
  "balance": 50.0,
  "initialAmount": 50.0,
  "expiryDate": "2027-12-31T00:00:00.000Z",
  "recipientEmail": "recipient@example.com",
  "message": "Admin issued gift card",
  "active": true
}
